title: update_space_fully existence check fetches id column unnecessarily
description: store.rs update_space_fully uses 'SELECT id FROM space WHERE id = ?' with (String,) to check existence. The id string is fetched and allocated but never used — only the Some/None result matters. Same pattern as the update_contact_fully fix in ca15355. Fix: 'SELECT 1 FROM space WHERE id = ?' with (i32,).
close_reason: Fixed: is_object guard in validate_member_patch + test; SELECT 1 in update_space_fully; decision record filed
